title: Ourcraft
description: Modpack for friends and multiplayer, focused on building items and decor, also with gameplay as cobblemon and create for the nerds like us <3
body:
_en_ Modpack made for multiplayer servers, a lot of focus on building blocks and aesthetics, also incremented gameplay with Create, Create Add-ons, ComputerCraft, Cobblemon and all Let's Do mods as well as some performance mods, shader Complementary with Euphoria Patches.


_br_ Modpack feito para servers multiplayer, muito focado em blocos para build e estetica, também contem mods de jogabilidade como Create, Add-ons de Create, ComputerCraft, Cobblemon e todos os mods do Let's do e também alguns mods de performance e shader Complementary com Euphoria Patches.




<details>
